title: Aggregate function group by primary key/non-primary key has differnet result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3(a INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, b TEXT DEFAULT NULL);
SELECT MAX(b) + 0 FROM t3 GROUP BY a;
CREATE TABLE t4(a INTEGER, b TEXT DEFAULT NULL);
SELECT MAX(b) + 0 FROM t4 GROUP BY a;
key_bug_features: Aggregate function group by primary key vs non-primary key
